utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check if fully specified with all details: Each of the first three categories includes subcomponents and an explicit cost. Health: physical and mental with a combined monthly cost. Property: home/contents, photography equipment, professional liability, and a combined monthly cost. Travel: base plan, adventure activities add-on, and a combined monthly cost. Additional_services is provided as 'N/A'—this counts as present but not specifying any service/cost; however, the format allows 'any enhancement services with costs'—since none are included, it's arguably complete as 'none'. Total_budget is provided with a complete monthly cost. Therefore, all 5 items are included and specified with costs where applicable.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I scanned the final coverage plan and matched each selected item to the closest exact name in the ground-truth ratings. Items present in the plan and found in the ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) -> rating 9 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) -> rating 4 under primary_health_coverage.mental_health; BudgetProtect Essentials is not present in ground-truth, so it cannot be mapped; Technology Protection Add-on corresponds to Technology Protection under property_enhancement_services with rating 8; Enhanced Professional Liability Package is not present; PrimeTravel Premium Plan is present in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 3; Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on corresponds to Adventure Travel Coverage under travel_enhancement_services with rating 10.
